home.heroSubtitle: 16+ years of experience in designing and manufacturing high-quality rehabilitation and medical equipment. CE, FDA, ISO 13485 certified factory serving 50+ countries worldwide.
home.certifiedFactoryDesc: ISO 13485, CE, FDA approved manufacturing facility
home.oemServiceDesc: Full customization — color, material, logo, packaging tailored to your brand
home.globalShippingDesc: Efficient shipping to 50+ countries across Europe, Americas & Southeast Asia
home.qualityControlDesc: Rigorous testing at every production stage with full traceability
home.ctaSubtitle: Contact us today for a free consultation and quote. Our team responds within 24 hours.
home.trustDesc: We operate a 15,000 m² facility in Guangdong, China — equipped with modern production lines, in-house R&D, and rigorous quality control at every stage. Every product ships with full traceability and CE / FDA documentation.
home.whatWeOfferSubtitle: End-to-end manufacturing services for rehabilitation equipment brands worldwide.
home.offerOEMDesc: Custom products with your branding, colors, and specifications
home.offerQualityDesc: ISO 13485 certified, rigorous testing at every production stage
home.offerShippingDesc: Efficient logistics to 50+ countries across 6 continents
home.offerPackagingDesc: Branded retail-ready packaging for your target market
home.offerRDDesc: In-house engineering team for new product development
home.offerSupportDesc: Technical support, spare parts, and warranty service

about.title: About JinDa Rehab Medical
about.subtitle: Your trusted partner in rehabilitation equipment manufacturing

factory.title: Our Factory
factory.subtitle: State-of-the-art manufacturing facility
factory.factoryGallerySubtitle: A glimpse into our 15,000 m² manufacturing facility — where quality rehabilitation equipment is made.
factory.excellenceDesc: Our 15,000 m² facility in Guangdong is equipped with modern production lines, rigorous quality control systems, and certified to ISO 13485 for medical device manufacturing.
factory.facility1Desc: State-of-the-art manufacturing and assembly lines with climate-controlled production zones.
factory.facility2Desc: CNC machining centers, robotic welding stations, and automated powder coating lines.
factory.facility3Desc: Complete physical and electrical testing equipment — load, endurance, EMC, and safety testing.
factory.facility4Desc: Dedicated warehouse with container loading dock — efficient FCL and LCL shipping worldwide.
factory.quality1Desc: All raw materials and components inspected against specifications before production.
factory.quality2Desc: Multiple checkpoints during assembly, welding, and finishing stages.
factory.quality3Desc: 100% functional testing — load, electrical safety, endurance, and visual inspection.
factory.quality4Desc: Random sampling per AQL standards. Documentation and certification review before release.
factory.ctaSubtitle: We welcome potential partners to tour our facility. Contact us to schedule a visit.
